codeReview.summary: Reviewed fix commit ef6a7d8 and original commit 67d9a52. The fix fully addresses the two blocking findings from the prior review (hardcoded SESSION_SECRET fallback and login timing side-channel), and the DB path remains stable via __dirname-relative resolution.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The fullstack-worker skill still prescribes mandatory agent-browser manual verification for all features, but this API-only security fix was executed and verified via CLI/tests without browser steps. The procedure should explicitly allow API-only exceptions.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/fullstack-worker/SKILL.md step 8 requires manual verification with agent-browser; transcript skeleton for workerSessionId 43fb20a3-3316-4e4d-bfaf-dd5621386150 contains no agent-browser usage while handoff.skillFeedback.followedProcedure is true.

summary: This fix adequately resolves the original auth-api-session-middleware failure: SESSION_SECRET is now required from environment with explicit missing/length checks in app.ts, login now performs dummy bcrypt verification on user-not-found in auth.ts to reduce timing leakage, and the prior db/index.ts __dirname-based path fix remains intact.
